TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Ke‚Äô-pu-e, title = Ke‚Äô-pu-e, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ke‚Äô-pu-e} }

S.FORM: == Ke'-pu-e ŚĖÄŚłÉÁąĺ == Ke'-pu-e, u A-hu-han a tukay, satabakiay nu Ke'-pu-e sen atu A-hu-han nu tukayan. u tulu a malebut a mihcaan nu likisian a tukayan, caypicpiclu mihcaan mala A-hu-han a tukay. " Ke'-pu-e" itini i Sin-de a kamuan " u pitelungan nu pisiwbayan" a imian. tuseptusep mihcaan, Ke'-pu-e tukay pulung nu tademaw makaala 4,222,000 tademaw. sakalamkamay a kalahadan nu sakalima nu kitakid a tukayan. ŚĖÄŚłÉÁąĺ, . malepacaw i labu atu Ta-li-pan a zitay ŚÖßśąįŤąáŚ°ĒŚą©ÁŹ≠śôāśúü caysiwsiwtu mihcaah sepat a bulad kainai'an nu laheci nu Na-ci-pu-la sihu, caayan kalecad nu mililiday a tademaw micumud tina tukayan, saan " pay-sa-wa nicudadan" patideng tu sihu, nika ci Ku-li-pu-tin. Si-ke'-ma-ti-ya-e a centan kaisa makakiyaku, sa malangatu masasupacaw maaalaw tiya tukay a kakuwanan, amilik satu masasuad namin. imahini kalingatuan a masasuada kina Ke-pu-e, makaala tu tulu a mangan nu tademaw itini tina " Ke-pu-e lepacaw" a patayan. katukuh i caysiwsiwnem mihcaan, nina niyadau' wal a bataan % mapeci' atu maluyuh, malumanay a tukay atu nutipan u kalawpesan nu kitidaan. 1992ŚĻī4 . caysiwsiwtu mihcaan tu lalud, macunus ku sakasasuad nu hitay, macunus ku nikalawpes nu Ke'-pu-e. itida aca nu kadecdecan nu dihep ku kakitidaan nu macimacian, sisa kakataydaan nu hitay a mueneng i liwilw nu buyu sawni bakuwangan tu tabakiay a lacu.sayaway nina macian a mikaput atu Si-ke-ti-ya-e a hitay masasuad, nika ilabu masasuada tu, nina ka pulungan amelik a mabulasak.nina tusaay a mihcaan, Ke'-pu-e a tuud mapeleng namin, milaliw namin ku tademaw tayda i inaka atu hekal nu kanatal, nai' ku nanum atu dinki. caysiwsiwsip tu hedek nu mihcaan, masaluimeng ku hitay tu sakay Ke'-pu-e a mibakuhac, apuyu' ku nisaluimeng nu macimacian a hulic atu kawaw. kina cacay aca malingatu kina huing, misuayaw tu sihu nu hitay tu sicumiay a tademaw palasicumian. 1992ŚĻīŚ§ŹŚ§©, . sakaudip Á∂ďśŅü Ke'-pu-e tapang a tuudan idaw ku mahka nipelu'an tu heci, nikansuan tu heci, nananuman, A-hu-han a tana', nu sidi a tuud, sakay tumunaw a tuud, sumamaday a dawa atu dikuc. caysiwpicwal mihcaan malingatu ku A-hu-han pihaceng ku lepacaw malalid ku Ke'-pu-e tu sakaudip, katukuh tu Ka-e-ca-yi pikuwanan itida i tusepsepcay mihcaan tu nipatidengan, Ke'-pu-e a sakaudip idaw tu ku cakatan. Kapah ku sakay dadanan, idaw ku dadan nu kulukiwk mitulin tu Ke'-pu-e niyadu' atu hamin nu kanatalan a niyadu'an. ilabu idaw ku kakanen, sabuut, misangaay tu sakay lumaan a tuudan, nituduhan a tuuda atu daylisiki nu kakulian. . Ka-e-cya itida i A-hu-han Walian, Sin-tu-ku'-se buyu' timulan, talakaw caypicsiwcay kun-ce a dihepan nu lalaan, katalawan kya kitidaan, buyubuyuan ku liklik masa wahelu. kakitidaan nu maci cayseptulu pinhunkunli, u satabakiay nu maci a kanatalan. Ka-e-cya sauwac makateban nu macian muculi ku nananum, mapela' ku Ke'-pu'-e-se, timulan u malumanay a tukay, amisan u Sin-cen a tukay. limulak ku Sin-cen, sasasiwbayan, hun-kun, luma nu tapang atu kapahay a luma' itida namin masaupu, yadah ku kun-tin, sasinganganay a kun-ten idaw ku ku-e-han-na-kun, di-e-ku'-sa-kun, sa'-la-ta-te'-kun, cen-wi-kun atu ta-e-man-kun. u kakakaygian ku ta-e-man-kun. tatelungan ku Ke-pu-e a Mea-wan-de macimacian mapatideng ku langdaway a Men-wan-de kakiningan a paya, liwliw nu kakiningan a paya idaw ku sepatay nu tabakiay a lacuna. U . liwliw nu maci a apilis, batu a buyu'an, sumamaday a tangku, sumamaday a lunem, sumamaday a buhung atu Yi-se-lan kiwkay, yadah ku biyu. sakasingangan idaw ku Sa-si-tu-sa-mu-se-la-biyu, Pa-pei-e lunem, kuo-wan Mu-ha-muo-de. D-na-e, Sa-a-lin lunem, Kuo-cya-pu-w-kun, Kaw-ku-puo-w-kun. cen-na a "ca-he'" miyu u Yi-se-lan matatunduhay a sangaan, u Yi-se-lan kiwkay patidengay a tademaw ci A-li a lumaan. micapitu biyaan tut ulu a bataan katukuh tu sepat a bataan a kun-ce idaaw ku tabakiay nu ba'tuan, i teban idaw ku pela' tu tusa a tunduhan, ahebal han cacay a tungduhan, sakamusa u ci A-li ku mialaay tu madicumay a bakan ku sapipela tina ba'tuan sa. . i liklik nina macimacian, yadah ku banaw atu sengesengetan , idaw ku cacay nu tabakiay a banawan atu sengesengetan ngangan han " Kol-e Hashmat Khan" u Ku-cen a wali tumulan. ina lanulanuan yadah ku pinaay nu malebut a In-tu atu Si-puo-li-ya mabahelay nu ayaman nu kasaluimengan a kitidaan, itida i tusepcaypic mihcaan, tidaay a sihu saan tina banawan u dadiputen a kitidaan sa. i tina banawan, makaadih kita tu caayay ka adih nu ayaman, mahida u Cin-dew atu Cen-yi-ti-hu ayaman. Ke'-pu-e duma nu tabakiay a banaw han u Ka-e-cya banaw, itida i teban nu nutipa ami tu siwa a kunlian, u tataydaan nu tidaay atu hekalay nu kanatalan nu midangay a tademaw itida. "Kol-e Hashmat Khan" . Ke'-pu-e u maacakay a kasienawan nu demiadan, i kasienawan sa a sinanum " kahetikan nu suleda" atu lutucan. ya kitidaan i talakaway nu buyu'an, atu nutipan timulan a kitidaan masasulecad, Ke'-pu-e cueded. nu cacayan a mihcaan nu lutucan a Ke'-pu-e sasengetay a demiadan, amica ku diheku nu demiad, pilaludan caay ka senged sa, caay ka caledes, diheku ku sapai' ku labii nu kalahukan nu sadingsingan, sienaw ku kasienawan, cacayay a bulad u untu makaala tu -2.3¬įC. cacay a mihcaan idaw tu ku cilal, nika payditeken tu untu 12.1 ¬įC ku untu. mikisaba tu A-hu-han tu duma a macimacian. 2.3 ¬įC. 12.1 ¬įC, .
S.PHON: == k…ô Ē~ °-pu-…ô *** == k…ô Ē~ °-pu-…ô, u a-ńßu-ńßan a tukaj, satabakiaj nu k…ô Ē~ °-pu-…ô s…ôn atu a-ńßu-ńßan nu tukajan. u tur~…ĺu a mar~…ĺ…ôbut a mińß ¶aan nu r~…ĺikisian a tukajan, ¶ajpi ¶pi ¶r~…ĺu mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa a-ńßu-ńßan a tukaj. " k…ô Ē~ °-pu-…ô" itini i sin-d…ô a kamuan " u pit…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu pisiwbajan" a imian. tus…ôptus…ôp mińß ¶aan, k…ô Ē~ °-pu-…ô tukaj pur~…ĺuŇč nu tad…ômaw makaar~…ĺa *,***,*** tad…ômaw. sakar~…ĺamkamaj a kar~…ĺańßadan nu sakar~…ĺima nu kitakid a tukajan. ***, . mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw i r~…ĺabu atu ta-r~…ĺi-pan a zitaj ******** ¶ajsiwsiwtu mińß ¶aańß s…ôpat a bur~…ĺad kainai Ē~ °an nu r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i nu na- ¶i-pu-r~…ĺa sińßu, ¶aajan kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj a tad…ômaw mi ¶umud tina tukajan, saan " paj-sa-wa ni ¶udadan" patid…ôŇč tu sińßu, nika ¶i ku-r~…ĺi-pu-tin. si-k…ô Ē~ °-ma-ti-ja-…ô a ¶…ôntan kaisa makakijaku, sa mar~…ĺaŇčatu masasupa ¶aw maaar~…ĺaw tija tukaj a kakuwanan, amir~…ĺik satu masasuad namin. imańßini kar~…ĺiŇčatuan a masasuada kina k…ô-pu-…ô, makaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺu a maŇčan nu tad…ômaw itini tina " k…ô-pu-…ô r~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw" a patajan. katukuńß i ¶ajsiwsiwn…ôm mińß ¶aan, nina nijadau Ē~ ° war~…ĺ a bataan % map…ô ¶i Ē~ ° atu mar~…ĺujuńß, mar~…ĺumanaj a tukaj atu nutipan u kar~…ĺawp…ôsan nu kitidaan. ****** . ¶ajsiwsiwtu mińß ¶aan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺud, ma ¶unus ku sakasasuad nu ńßitaj, ma ¶unus ku nikar~…ĺawp…ôs nu k…ô Ē~ °-pu-…ô. itida a ¶a nu kad…ô ¶d…ô ¶an nu dińß…ôp ku kakitidaan nu ma ¶ima ¶ian, sisa kakatajdaan nu ńßitaj a mu…ôn…ôŇč i r~…ĺiwir~…ĺw nu buju sawni bakuwaŇčan tu tabakiaj a r~…ĺa ¶u.sajawaj nina ma ¶ian a mikaput atu si-k…ô-ti-ja-…ô a ńßitaj masasuad, nika ir~…ĺabu masasuada tu, nina ka pur~…ĺuŇčan am…ôr~…ĺik a mabur~…ĺasak.nina tusaaj a mińß ¶aan, k…ô Ē~ °-pu-…ô a tuud map…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇč namin, mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw namin ku tad…ômaw tajda i inaka atu ¶ian a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ atu kawaw. kina ¶a ¶aj a ¶a mar~…ĺiŇčatu kina ńßuiŇč, misuajaw tu sińßu nu ńßitaj tu si ¶umiaj a tad…ômaw par~…ĺasi ¶umian. *******, . sakaudip ** k…ô Ē~ °-pu-…ô tapaŇč a tuudan idaw ku mańßka nip…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °an tu ńß…ô ¶i, nikansuan tu ńß…ô ¶i, nananuman, a-ńßu-ńßan a tana Ē~ °, nu sidi a tuud, sakaj tumunaw a tuud, sumamadaj a dawa atu diku ¶. ¶ajsiwpi ¶war~…ĺ mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu ku a-ńßu-ńßan pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku r~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw mar~…ĺar~…ĺid ku k…ô Ē~ °-pu-…ô tu sakaudip, katukuńß tu ka-…ô- ¶a-ji pikuwanan itida i tus…ôps…ôp ¶aj mińß ¶aan tu nipatid…ôŇčan, k…ô Ē~ °-pu-…ô kaw-ku-puo-w-kun. ¶…ôn-na a " ¶a-ńß…ô Ē~ °" miju u ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan matatunduńßaj a saŇčaan, u ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan kiwkaj patid…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw ¶i a-r~…ĺi a r~…ĺumaan. mi ¶apitu bijaan tut ur~…ĺu a bataan katukuńß tu s…ôpat a bataan a kun- ¶…ô idaaw ku tabakiaj nu ba Ē~ °tuan, i t…ôban idaw ku p…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° tu tusa a tunduńßan, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ńßan ¶a ¶aj a tuŇčduńßan, sakamusa u ¶i a-r~…ĺi ku miar~…ĺaaj tu madi ¶umaj a bakan ku sapip…ôr~…ĺa tina ba Ē~ °tuan sa. . i r~…ĺikr~…ĺik nina ma ¶ima ¶ian, jadańß ku banaw atu s…ôŇč…ôs…ôŇč…ôtan , idaw ku ¶a ¶aj nu tabakiaj a banawan atu s…ôŇč…ôs…ôŇč…ôtan ŇčaŇčan ńßan " kor~…ĺ-…ô ńßasńßmat kńßan" u ku- ¶…ôn a war~…ĺi tumur~…ĺan. ina r~…ĺanur~…ĺanuan jadańß ku pinaaj nu mar~…ĺ…ôbut a in-tu atu si-puo-r~…ĺi-ja mabańß…ôr~…ĺaj nu ajaman nu kasar~…ĺuim…ôŇčan a kitidaan, itida i tus…ôp ¶ajpi ¶ mińß ¶aan, tidaaj a sińßu saan tina banawan u dadiput…ôn a kitidaan sa. i tina banawan, makaadińß kita tu ¶aajaj ka adińß nu ajaman, mańßida u ¶in-d…ôw atu ¶…ôn-ji-ti-ńßu ajaman. k…ô Ē~ °-pu-…ô duma nu tabakiaj a banaw ńßan u ka-…ô- ¶ja banaw, itida i t…ôban nu nutipa ami tu siwa a kunr~…ĺian, u tatajdaan nu tidaaj atu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu kanatar~…ĺan nu midaŇčaj a tad…ômaw itida. "kor~…ĺ-…ô ńßasńßmat kńßan" . k…ô Ē~ °-pu-…ô u maa ¶akaj a kasi…ônawan nu d…ômiadan, i kasi…ônawan sa a sinanum " kańß…ôtikan nu sur~…ĺ…ôda" atu r~…ĺutu ¶an. ja kitidaan i tar~…ĺakawaj nu buju Ē~ °an, atu nutipan timur~…ĺan a kitidaan masasur~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, k…ô Ē~ °-pu-…ô ¶u…ôd…ôd. nu ¶a ¶ajan a mińß ¶aan nu r~…ĺutu ¶an a k…ô Ē~ °-pu-…ô sas…ôŇč…ôtaj a d…ômiadan, ami ¶a ku dińß…ôku nu d…ômiad, pir~…ĺar~…ĺudan ¶aaj ka s…ôŇč…ôd sa, ¶aaj ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs, dińß…ôku ku sapai Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺabii nu kar~…ĺańßukan nu sadiŇčsiŇčan, si…ônaw ku kasi…ônawan, ¶a ¶ajaj a bur~…ĺad u untu makaar~…ĺa tu -*.** ¶. ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan idaw tu ku ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ, nika pajdit…ôk…ôn tu untu **.* * ¶ ku untu. mikisaba tu a-ńßu-ńßan tu duma a ma ¶ima ¶ian. *.* * ¶. **.* * ¶, .
S.FORM: == Ke'-pu-e ŚĖÄŚłÉÁąĺ == Ke'-pu-e, u A-hu-han a tukay, satabakiay nu Ke'-pu-e sen atu A-hu-han nu tukayan. u tulu a malebut a mihcaan nu likisian a tukayan, caypicpiclu mihcaan mala A-hu-han a tukay. " Ke'-pu-e" itini i Sin-de a kamuan " u pitelungan nu pisiwbayan" a imian. tuseptusep mihcaan, Ke'-pu-e tukay pulung nu tademaw makaala 4,222,000 tademaw. sakalamkamay a kalahadan nu sakalima nu kitakid a tukayan. ŚĖÄŚłÉÁąĺ, . malepacaw i labu atu Ta-li-pan a zitay ŚÖßśąįŤąáŚ°ĒŚą©ÁŹ≠śôāśúü caysiwsiwtu mihcaah sepat a bulad kainai'an nu laheci nu Na-ci-pu-la sihu, caayan kalecad nu mililiday a tademaw micumud tina tukayan, saan " pay-sa-wa nicudadan" patideng tu sihu, nika ci Ku-li-pu-tin. Si-ke'-ma-ti-ya-e a centan kaisa makakiyaku, sa malangatu masasupacaw maaalaw tiya tukay a kakuwanan, amilik satu masasuad namin. imahini kalingatuan a masasuada kina Ke-pu-e, makaala tu tulu a mangan nu tademaw itini tina " Ke-pu-e lepacaw" a patayan. katukuh i caysiwsiwnem mihcaan, nina niyadau' wal a bataan % mapeci' atu maluyuh, malumanay a tukay atu nutipan u kalawpesan nu kitidaan. 1992ŚĻī4 . caysiwsiwtu mihcaan tu lalud, macunus ku sakasasuad nu hitay, macunus ku nikalawpes nu Ke'-pu-e. itida aca nu kadecdecan nu dihep ku kakitidaan nu macimacian, sisa kakataydaan nu hitay a mueneng i liwilw nu buyu sawni bakuwangan tu tabakiay a lacu.sayaway nina macian a mikaput atu Si-ke-ti-ya-e a hitay masasuad, nika ilabu masasuada tu, nina ka pulungan amelik a mabulasak.nina tusaay a mihcaan, Ke'-pu-e a tuud mapeleng namin, milaliw namin ku tademaw tayda i inaka atu hekal nu kanatal, nai' ku nanum atu dinki. caysiwsiwsip tu hedek nu mihcaan, masaluimeng ku hitay tu sakay Ke'-pu-e a mibakuhac, apuyu' ku nisaluimeng nu macimacian a hulic atu kawaw. kina cacay aca malingatu kina huing, misuayaw tu sihu nu hitay tu sicumiay a tademaw palasicumian. 1992ŚĻīŚ§ŹŚ§©, . sakaudip Á∂ďśŅü Ke'-pu-e tapang a tuudan idaw ku mahka nipelu'an tu heci, nikansuan tu heci, nananuman, A-hu-han a tana', nu sidi a tuud, sakay tumunaw a tuud, sumamaday a dawa atu dikuc. caysiwpicwal mihcaan malingatu ku A-hu-han pihaceng ku lepacaw malalid ku Ke'-pu-e tu sakaudip, katukuh tu Ka-e-ca-yi pikuwanan itida i tusepsepcay mihcaan tu nipatidengan, Ke'-pu-e a sakaudip idaw tu ku cakatan. Kapah ku sakay dadanan, idaw ku dadan nu kulukiwk mitulin tu Ke'-pu-e niyadu' atu hamin nu kanatalan a niyadu'an. ilabu idaw ku kakanen, sabuut, misangaay tu sakay lumaan a tuudan, nituduhan a tuuda atu daylisiki nu kakulian. . Ka-e-cya itida i A-hu-han Walian, Sin-tu-ku'-se buyu' timulan, talakaw caypicsiwcay kun-ce a dihepan nu lalaan, katalawan kya kitidaan, buyubuyuan ku liklik masa wahelu. kakitidaan nu maci cayseptulu pinhunkunli, u satabakiay nu maci a kanatalan. Ka-e-cya sauwac makateban nu macian muculi ku nananum, mapela' ku Ke'-pu'-e-se, timulan u malumanay a tukay, amisan u Sin-cen a tukay. limulak ku Sin-cen, sasasiwbayan, hun-kun, luma nu tapang atu kapahay a luma' itida namin masaupu, yadah ku kun-tin, sasinganganay a kun-ten idaw ku ku-e-han-na-kun, di-e-ku'-sa-kun, sa'-la-ta-te'-kun, cen-wi-kun atu ta-e-man-kun. u kakakaygian ku ta-e-man-kun. tatelungan ku Ke-pu-e a Mea-wan-de macimacian mapatideng ku langdaway a Men-wan-de kakiningan a paya, liwliw nu kakiningan a paya idaw ku sepatay nu tabakiay a lacuna. U . liwliw nu maci a apilis, batu a buyu'an, sumamaday a tangku, sumamaday a lunem, sumamaday a buhung atu Yi-se-lan kiwkay, yadah ku biyu. sakasingangan idaw ku Sa-si-tu-sa-mu-se-la-biyu, Pa-pei-e lunem, kuo-wan Mu-ha-muo-de. D-na-e, Sa-a-lin lunem, Kuo-cya-pu-w-kun, Kaw-ku-puo-w-kun. cen-na a "ca-he'" miyu u Yi-se-lan matatunduhay a sangaan, u Yi-se-lan kiwkay patidengay a tademaw ci A-li a lumaan. micapitu biyaan tut ulu a bataan katukuh tu sepat a bataan a kun-ce idaaw ku tabakiay nu ba'tuan, i teban idaw ku pela' tu tusa a tunduhan, ahebal han cacay a tungduhan, sakamusa u ci A-li ku mialaay tu madicumay a bakan ku sapipela tina ba'tuan sa. . i liklik nina macimacian, yadah ku banaw atu sengesengetan , idaw ku cacay nu tabakiay a banawan atu sengesengetan ngangan han " Kol-e Hashmat Khan" u Ku-cen a wali tumulan. ina lanulanuan yadah ku pinaay nu malebut a In-tu atu Si-puo-li-ya mabahelay nu ayaman nu kasaluimengan a kitidaan, itida i tusepcaypic mihcaan, tidaay a sihu saan tina banawan u dadiputen a kitidaan sa. i tina banawan, makaadih kita tu caayay ka adih nu ayaman, mahida u Cin-dew atu Cen-yi-ti-hu ayaman. Ke'-pu-e duma nu tabakiay a banaw han u Ka-e-cya banaw, itida i teban nu nutipa ami tu siwa a kunlian, u tataydaan nu tidaay atu hekalay nu kanatalan nu midangay a tademaw itida. "Kol-e Hashmat Khan" . Ke'-pu-e u maacakay a kasienawan nu demiadan, i kasienawan sa a sinanum " kahetikan nu suleda" atu lutucan. ya kitidaan i talakaway nu buyu'an, atu nutipan timulan a kitidaan masasulecad, Ke'-pu-e cueded. nu cacayan a mihcaan nu lutucan a Ke'-pu-e sasengetay a demiadan, amica ku diheku nu demiad, pilaludan caay ka senged sa, caay ka caledes, diheku ku sapai' ku labii nu kalahukan nu sadingsingan, sienaw ku kasienawan, cacayay a bulad u untu makaala tu -2.3¬įC. cacay a mihcaan idaw tu ku cilal, nika payditeken tu untu 12.1 ¬įC ku untu. mikisaba tu A-hu-han tu duma a macimacian. 2.3 ¬įC. 12.1 ¬įC, .

a kar~…ĺańßadan nu sakar~…ĺima nu kitakid a tukajan. ***, . mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw i r~…ĺabu atu ta-r~…ĺi-pan a zitaj ******** ¶ajsiwsiwtu mińß ¶aańß s…ôpat a bur~…ĺad kainai Ē~ °an nu r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i nu na-
